states.name: Little Mermaid
states.title: Guardian of the Sea
states.description: Eva was born as the sixth princess of the merfolk kingdom, far away from human dwellings on land. Her voice was the finest among her people, and sea creatures came from far and near just to listen to her sing. She was her country's most beloved treasure.

states.name: Little Mermaid
states.title: Guardian of the Sea
states.description: But the peaceful merfolk kingdom wasn't beyond the reach of the Pandemonium. Hordes of monsters raged under the sea as violently as they did on land; Eva's countrymen came under attack, and in the end, the kingdom fell. All the merfolk lost their lives—apart from one.

states.name: Little Mermaid
states.title: Guardian of the Sea
states.description:
Overcome with grief, Eva made a pact with a divine being and gained the power to protect the seas. But her new abilities came with a price—everyone she met forgot about her the very next day.
For 2000 long years, she fought one lonely battle after another, doomed to have her existence wiped from people's memory no matter what she did.
